name: omniroute
description: Native OmniProxy integration for OmniCode chat models, provider accounts, proxies, and model sync.

walkthroughs.title: OmniProxy Control Center
walkthroughs.description: Set up providers, sync custom models, manage RTK routing, and inspect OmniProxy from a native OmniCode editor page.

steps.title: Runtime and Access
steps.description:
Fields: `omniroute.baseUrl`, `omniroute.nodePath`, `omniroute.npmPath`, `omniroute.autoStart`.
Use this card to point OmniProxy at the right local runtime and choose whether it launches automatically.
[Set Base URL](command:omniroute.configureBaseUrl)
[Set Node Runtime](command:omniroute.configureNodePath)
[Set npm Runtime](command:omniroute.configureNpmPath)
[Toggle Auto-Start](command:omniroute.toggleAutoStart)
[Open OmniProxy Settings](command:omniroute.openSettings)

steps.title: Provider Accounts
steps.description:
Connect multiple provider accounts directly inside OmniCode. OmniProxy stays unlocked with local access and no sign-in wall, so accounts and access keys can be managed here immediately.
[Connect Provider](command:omniroute.connectProvider)
[Refresh Access Key](command:omniroute.issueAccessKey)
[Refresh OmniProxy State](command:omniroute.refresh)

steps.title: Custom Models
steps.description:
Sync OmniProxy-managed models into the standard Language Models system so they show up in the normal picker and in custom provider management.
[Sync OmniProxy Models](command:omniroute.syncModels)
[Manage Language Models](command:omniroute.openModels)
[Open Model Picker](command:workbench.action.chat.openModelPicker)

steps.title: Proxy Mesh and RTK
steps.description:
Register proxies and route AI tunnel traffic through OmniProxy to reduce token overhead and centralize provider access. Use this card for RTK and upstream proxy setup.
[Add Proxy](command:omniroute.addProxy)
[Refresh OmniProxy State](command:omniroute.refresh)
[Show OmniProxy Output](command:omniroute.showOutput)

media.altText: OmniProxy proxy mesh and RTK card

steps.title: Diagnostics and Overview
steps.description:
Inspect logs, verify the local service, and reopen this control center at any time from the OmniProxy titlebar button.
[Show OmniProxy Output](command:omniroute.showOutput)
[Open OmniProxy Settings](command:omniroute.openSettings)
[Refresh OmniProxy State](command:omniroute.refresh)

omniroute.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the local OmniProxy dashboard.

omniroute.autoStart.description: Start OmniProxy automatically when the integration is used.

omniroute.nodePath.description: Node.js binary used to run OmniProxy.

omniroute.npmPath.description: npm binary used to install and run OmniProxy.
